edge_hypothesis: Stochastic K/D crossovers in oversold/overbought zones detect mean-reversion inflection points within a range. The template has been DEAD (0 trades for 3 cycles) because the default OB/OS zones (K>80/K<20) are too extreme for crypto's persistent volatility — price rarely reaches these levels on 4h bars. Widening to K>65/K<35 and K>70/K<30 should generate trades while still targeting extreme-enough conditions for reversal probability. The edge is that crypto ranges (ETH/4h ranging PF=1.127 on BTC, ETH/1h ranging PF=1.115 on prior data) show mean-reversion works — stochastic just needs calibrated zones. Regime assumption: ranging only (ADX<25). Invalidation: if widened zones still produce <10 trades, the stochastic indicator's OB/OS zones are fundamentally mismatched with crypto price distribution and the template should be permanently retired.

variants.name: stoch_wide_zones_ranging
variants.description: Stochastic K/D crossover with widened OB/OS zones (65/35) to fix the 0-trade problem. K<35 for oversold long entries, K>65 for overbought short entries. Tight 2:1 R:R for quick mean-reversion captures within ranges. This is the diagnostic variant — if it still produces 0 trades, stochastic is permanently unsuitable for crypto.
entry_long: STOCHk < 35 confirms oversold zone (widened from default 20).
entry_short: STOCHk > 65 confirms overbought zone (widened from default 80).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Data required: ETH OHLCV on 4h and 1h
exit_rules: Exit long when STOCHk crosses below STOCHd (reversal of entry signal).
Exit short when STOCHk crosses above STOCHd.
Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (2.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Widened zones still too restrictive, or ranging price action doesn't reach stochastic extremes on 4h bars
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 2.0x ATR_14 from entry.

variants.name: stoch_moderate_zones_tight_exit
variants.description: Stochastic K/D crossover with moderate zone widening (70/30). Tighter than the diagnostic variant to test whether moderate widening is sufficient. 1.5:1 R:R for fast mean-reversion scalps. If this produces trades while K<20/K>80 doesn't, the zone calibration is the fix.
entry_long: STOCHk < 30 confirms oversold zone (widened from default 20).
entry_short: STOCHk > 70 confirms overbought zone (widened from default 80).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Data required: ETH OHLCV on 4h and 1h
exit_rules: Exit long when STOCHk crosses below STOCHd.
Exit short when STOCHk crosses above STOCHd.
Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (1.5x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: 1.5:1 R:R may be insufficient to overcome fee drag at high trade frequency
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 1.5x ATR_14 from entry.

variants.name: stoch_aggressive_zones_wide_tp
variants.description: Stochastic K/D crossover with aggressively widened zones (60/40). Maximum trade generation to definitively determine if stochastic can work in crypto. Wider TP (2.5:1) to capture larger reversions. If even 60/40 produces <20 trades, stochastic is structurally incompatible with crypto on these timeframes.
entry_long: STOCHk < 40 confirms oversold zone (aggressively widened from default 20).
entry_short: STOCHk > 60 confirms overbought zone (aggressively widened from default 80).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Data required: ETH OHLCV on 4h and 1h
exit_rules: Exit long when STOCHk crosses below STOCHd.
Exit short when STOCHk crosses above STOCHd.
Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (2.5x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Zones too wide — signals fire in non-extreme conditions with no reversal edge
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 2.5x ATR_14 from entry.
